entity.label: Zaccai
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Pure, one whose “sons” returned with Zerubbabel to Jerusalem (Ezra 2:9; Neh. 7:14).

verses.text: The children of Zaccai, seven hundred and threescore.
